_comment: Copy to endpoints.json and fill in. baseUrl + per-endpoint definitions. NEVER put credentials here — they come from API_USER / API_PASS env vars.

headers._comment: optional extra headers sent on every call, e.g. a tenant id

probes.name: missing-id
probes.expect: 404 or validation error — documents required path param behavior

probes.name: bad-id-type
probes.expect: what happens with a non-numeric id?

probes.name: missing-required-name
probes.expect: is name required? what error shape/message?
